name: Schlumberger NV
description: SLB (formerly Schlumberger) is a global technology company that provides comprehensive services to the energy industry. The company specializes in reservoir characterization, drilling, production, and processing for oil and gas operators. Beyond traditional energy services, SLB is actively expanding its portfolio to include digital solutions, carbon capture and storage, and geothermal energy technologies. By integrating advanced data analytics, AI, and engineering expertise, SLB helps its clients optimize asset performance, improve operational efficiency, and transition toward more sustainable energy practices on a global scale.
